Text.Page:
Earlier, I saw the strangest thing. A group of mysterious men came by and put up that odd stone obelisk over there.

I'm curious, but I confess I'm afraid to check it out for myself. Will you take a look?
((You feel sick and dizzy as you approach the stone. When you touch the surface, your hand tingles and your arm aches. When you take your hand away, you're holding a shard.))

Can I see that?

Ow!

There's some powerful magic in this, . I'll keep it and see what I can find out.
